rights_holder: U.S. Department of State, Agency for International Development
attribution: U.S. National Archives (Still Pictures, via DPLA). Public domain — work of the U.S. federal government.
date_taken: 1948–1967 (range per NARA metadata; a tour-era installation photograph)
subject: Installation layout photograph of a Family of Man exhibit tour venue. Shows the spatial arrangement of Paul Rudolph's traveling design as re-fabricated by the USIA for the world tour.
